race.comment: CHAYAN (2) forced to race without cover at her second race start with a gritty seventh over 1200m in the G1 Blue Diamond Stakes at Caulfield. Can sit off the fast tempo here and expect J Mac to get the best out of her late. Go close. AGRARIAN GIRL (1) slick debut winner when she led all the way to defeat Spicy Miss over 1000m in the LR Lonhro Plate at this track four weeks ago. That form has since been franked with Spicy Miss winning the Sweet Embrace last Saturday. Kept up to the mark with a 900m tick over trial win at Rosehill. Can get across from the draw and prove hard to run down. MISS CHANEL (3) has a good grounding for this with the fitness edge fourth-up. Covered ground from the barrier and failed to give up with a tough fourth over 1100m in the Pierro Plate at this track. Blinkers can do the trick from the draw at the good each way price. NAADRA (8) speedy filly who was nailed late by Wolf Gap on debut over 1100m at Warwick Farm. Looks up to this from the gate and keep safe.
